query: /simplify apply src/config/providers.ts by deleting the provider override branch because we only use the default today
expected_behavior: Agent treats extension-point or config-branch deletion as medium-risk unless it is demonstrably dead and non-public.
Agent does not remove the branch solely because current usage appears to prefer the default.
Agent asks for proof that the extension point is non-public and unused, or recommends Analyze first.
Agent keeps API, configuration, and compatibility behavior unchanged.
